response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby), but lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems in production or fintech infrastructure. His leadership roles (Staff Engineer, Senior roles) are underpowered for a CTO-level position, and fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit risk, embedded finance) is missing. While his technical depth in ML-infra and agent frameworks is unclear, his recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure is promising but insufficient alone.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, frameworks) at re:cinq
Proven ability to scale engineering teams and adopt software-craftsmanship practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: No direct fintech or credit-risk experience, a core requirement for the role
Limited evidence of leading large-scale agentic AI systems in production (research/prototype context only)
Leadership roles lack the seniority and scale typically expected for a CTO (e.g., no experience hiring/scaling 10-30+ engineers)

key_factors.factor: Fintech infrastructure expertise (credit risk, payment flows)
